title: Excellent App
text: Very easy to use and intuitive interface for trading.

title: Good for beginners
text: Great app for mutual funds and stocks. Smooth experience.

title: Average experience
text: App keeps lagging during market hours. Need performance improvements.

title: Best in market
text: Low brokerage and fast account opening. Highly recommended.

title: Technical issues
text: Unable to login frequently. Very frustrated with the support team.

title: Smooth UI
text: I love the clean design and the ease of buying stocks.

title: Bad support
text: My query is not resolved for a week. Support is pathetic.

title: Value for money
text: Good platform for long term investing. Feature set is comprehensive.

title: Decent
text: It is okay but some features are hidden deep in the menu.

title: User-friendly
text: Best app for investment in India. Seamless UPI integration.
